name: concept db
text:
не референсы - язык не эффекты - состояния не сцены - режимы

refn, lynch, under the skin, villeneuve, richi, gaspar noe void, tension, dissolve, focus light color, intensity, neon glow soft gradients motion drift pulse flicker

urban building windows grid, night lights, reflections in glass dark facades analog vinyl noise dust / grain imperfections

extract composition, silhouette, emptiness, light spots, color pair, layering, movement character
